title: Remote install hangs at 100% — wrapper finalize stall (.part never promoted)
description: Surfaced live during MPI-244 testing (Krea2 transformer). The app bar reaches 100% but the model never flips INSTALLED and hangs forever. INVESTIGATION (this session, evidence-backed): the /comfy/models/check wrapper view showed krea2-turbo-transformer installed=false, partialBytes==full expected size (13141730784), FROZEN across polls; wrapper /health comfy_ready=false, download_mode=true STUCK. So the .part is fully written (all bytes) but NEVER renamed to the final .safetensors and never sha-verified -> wrapper honestly reports installed=false forever. The completion never HAPPENED (not lost) - the finalize step (rename + sha256 + emit models:install-complete + clear download_mode) is stuck. This is wrapper.py's finalize path = the getsize-progress peer agent's lane (Pod c5576m26kwecc6, wrapper 0.2.35). LEADING SUSPECT: MPI-253's watchdog false-firing mid-sha on the first big 12GB weight, aborting the finalize. RELATED (NOT this bug): the app-side lost-SSE reconcile shipped as a0abef8b (settles a dep whose terminal SSE was lost on an ALREADY-finalized file) - correct for its case, cannot cure a stall where no final file exists. Handed to peer with full evidence (messages under state/messages/). BLOCKED on wrapper.py finalize investigation.
